title: Tampa Heat Wave
lead: Tampa is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.00. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tampa is causing extremely hot temperatures, with a CDD of 9.5 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 76%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is at 12.0 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
